description:
You are a Customer Service Representative at a wholesale electronics distributor. You've been handling multiple support tickets about the same recurring issue — customers receiving payment gateway timeout errors during checkout. You've identified the root cause and solution, and now need to document it in the SuiteCRM Knowledge Base so other support team members can quickly resolve similar tickets.

Create a new Knowledge Base article in SuiteCRM with the following details:

- Title (Name): Resolving Payment Gateway Timeout Errors (Code PG-408)
- Status: Published
- Revision: 1.0
- Description/Body: 
Issue: Customers intermittently receive timeout errors during checkout when using the Meridian payment gateway, typically during peak hours (11am-2pm EST).

Root Cause: The default API timeout threshold of 15 seconds is insufficient when the gateway experiences high load.

Resolution Steps:
1. Navigate to Admin > Payment Gateway Settings
2. Increase the API Timeout value from 15 to 45 seconds
3. Enable the retry-on-timeout option
4. Clear the transaction cache
5. Advise the customer to retry their transaction

If the issue persists after these steps, escalate to Tier 2 with reference code PG-408.

metadata.expected_title: Resolving Payment Gateway Timeout Errors (Code PG-408)
